title: ardisia praetervisa
intro: Ardisia praetervisa is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae, commonly known as the pink ardisia or Japanese pink ardisia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ardisia praetervisa are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of various infections. Ardisia praetervisa is often prepared as a tea, extract, or capsule, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies in East Asia.
